name: FYNSA Adm Gen De Fondos Sa - Fondo De Inversion Fynsa Desarollo Inmobiliario
summary: FYNSA Adm Gen De Fondos Sa - Fondo De Inversion Fynsa Desarollo Inmobiliario invests in real estate development projects. It is managed by FYNSA Adm Gen De Fondos Sa. The fund aims to provide investors with returns through investments in a diversified portfolio of real estate development projects.
